title: Quadrature rule optimization
summary: A one-dimensional numerical integration result where candidate quadrature rules are evaluated against analytic integrands and retained only when the measured objective improves.
problem_statement: Find a compact quadrature rule that reduces integration error across a fixed suite of analytic functions while keeping the rule inspectable and replayable.

evaluation_contract.summary: Candidates are scored on a frozen analytic integrand suite using a single lower-is-better objective. Accepted candidates must improve the objective without changing the evaluation contract.

website.card_summary: Candidate quadrature rules are evaluated against analytic integrands and retained only when the measured objective improves.
